description_long: This jet ski features a sleek, aerodynamic body with a wide, wing-like front and a tapered rear, designed for high-speed water travel. The surface displays a gradient color scheme transitioning from blue at the lower edges to green and brownish hues on the upper surfaces, giving it a modern and sporty appearance. The central section is slightly raised, likely housing the engine and internal components, while the sides flare outward, enhancing stability on water. Subtle panel lines and contours are visible, suggesting reinforced structural areas and possible access panels. The top surface appears smooth and streamlined, with no visible protruding controls or handlebars. The overall design emphasizes speed, maneuverability, and a futuristic aesthetic suitable for recreational or urban waterfront environments.
description: A sleek, wing-shaped jet ski with a smooth, gradient-colored surface and a streamlined, modern design. The body is wide and aerodynamic, with subtle contours and a raised central section.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, wing-like front with a central raised section and smooth, contoured surfaces.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the low profile, aerodynamic tapering, and the gentle upward curve of the rear section.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the broad, slightly curved back and the symmetry of the wing-like extensions.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view emphasizes the flared sides and the smooth transition from the central body to the edges.
attribute_handlebar_design: No visible handlebar is present in the images; the top surface appears smooth and uninterrupted.
attribute_seat_configuration: The seat area is integrated into the central raised section, appearing as a single, contoured position with no visible seams or separate seating areas; color and material match the rest of the body.
